description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a rectangular footprint and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior is predominantly white with large, grid-like windows and several green landscaping elements, including hedges and palm trees. The rear of the bungalow features a spacious backyard with a green lawn, a swimming pool, and lounge chairs, creating a luxurious outdoor living area. The front facade is more enclosed, with a combination of solid walls and vertical greenery, while the sides show a mix of windows and private terraces. The roofline is flat, and the building appears to be a single story with open-plan interior spaces visible through the windows. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open space, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped greenery, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view shows a solid white facade with vertical greenery, large windows, and a main entrance flanked by hedges.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a long, windowed wall, a private terrace, and a glimpse of the backyard lawn and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the spacious backyard with a green lawn, swimming pool, palm trees, and lounge chairs, as well as large windows opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Right side view displays more windows, a terrace, and additional landscaping, with the pool and palm trees visible at the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and terrace openings
